examples: Me being to watch in the ball turret I was scared shitless countless times.
I don't see an intelligent, confident man. I see a cocky, scared shitless kid.
I look at you. I don't see an intelligent, confident man. I see a cocky, scared-shitless kid.
But an ambulance was not the only memento mori, and there were other auguries capable of scaring us shitless.
